description.download: Get media files from X (Twitter) post.

params_desc.download_url: The URL of the X (Twitter) post.

embed_set_channel.title: Set Tweet Download Channel
embed_set_channel.description:
## Introduction
After setting this channel as a **Tweet Download Channel**, you can directly put X(Twitter) links here, and I will download the images and videos of that post to the path you set in config.toml.
The link will also be sent here.

## Current Status
- Is this channel a **Tweet Download Channel**: {enable}

embed_help.title: Command Help
embed_help.description:
## Command List

- `/set_channel`: **Set Download Channel**. Manage automatic download for this channel.
- `/download <url>`: **Manual Download**. Input X (Twitter) link to manually download media.
- `/my_id`: **Query ID**. Get your Discord user ID.
- `/help`: **Command Help**. Show this help message.

## Features

1. **Auto Download**: After setting a channel as "Tweet Download Channel" with `/set_channel`, simply paste X links in the channel, and the bot will automatically parse and download all images and videos.
2. **Manual Download**: Use `/download` with a link to preview content and choose to download individual media or all media.
